Sunken cathedral, stained glass glowing faintly as bioluminescent fish drift through the flooded nave in eerie silence.
Storm-wrecked galleon lying sideways, broken masts tangled with kelp, cannons spilling from rotted gun ports into sand.
Drowned graveyard on a submerged hill, barnacle-encrusted crosses tilting among the bones of forgotten sailors below.
Ghost ship drifting through dense fog, empty lanterns swinging on deck, phantom sails billowing without wind or crew.
Underwater bone yard where whale skeletons intertwine with shattered ship timbers, creating a cathedral of death below.
Flooded dungeon with rusted chains dangling, iron cell doors ajar, dark water pouring through cracked stone ceiling above.
Volcanic black-rock coastline under lightning storm, waves crashing against obsidian cliffs, illuminating jagged formations momentarily bright.
Sunken treasure vault with collapsed shelving, gold coins scattered across silt, chests broken open by water pressure.
Kelp forest so dense sunlight cannot penetrate, creating perpetual underwater twilight where shadows move without source.
Whirlpool's edge where debris spirals downward, wreckage circling the dark vortex pulling everything toward crushing depths.
Abandoned lighthouse half-submerged, spiral stairs descending into black water, broken lens refracting moonlight through cracked windows.
Shipwreck graveyard in shallow reef, dozens of hulls piled together, masts piercing surface like skeletal fingers.
Drowned mansion with grand staircase intact, jellyfish drifting through ballroom, chandeliers swaying in invisible currents below.
Ancient prison hulk tilted in murky harbor, iron cages visible through hull breaches, chains trailing into sediment.
Storm-battered whaling ship impaled on rocks, harpoons still mounted, whale bones scattered on seafloor beneath keel.
Flooded crypt with stone coffins forced open, skeletal remains drifting among centuries of accumulated silt and darkness.
Underwater canyon at midnight, bioluminescent creatures the only light, revealing endless depths where nothing else survives.
Derelict submarine resting on abyssal plain, hatches open to darkness, scattered debris indicating catastrophic hull failure.
Coral-encrusted anchor chains descending into trench, origin vessel long disintegrated, links disappearing into absolute blackness below.
Sunken harbor during blood moon, dozens of merchant ships collapsed together, cargo spilled across dock stones.
Drowned bell tower emerging from silt, massive bell hanging silent, rope still attached and swaying gently.
Ice-locked shipwreck in polar waters, frozen crew still at posts, preserved perfectly in crystalline tomb.
Submerged mineshaft entrance on coastal cliff, flooded tunnels extending into rock, ore carts rusting on tracks.
Ghost fleet anchored in perpetual storm, lightning revealing empty decks momentarily, thunder echoing across cursed waters.
Barnacle-covered iron maiden chained to seafloor, spikes intact, positioned near other torture devices in drowned execution ground.
